# potatofocus

> potatofocus is a minimal no-login pomodoro timer for focused work and study. It combines a clean timer, ambient focus sounds, country-aware profiles, daily progress, and a global leaderboard.

## Primary URL

- [potatofocus app](https://potatofocus.app/)

## What The Product Does

- Runs focus, short break, and long break timers.
- Tracks a daily focus target of 16 completed focus sessions.
- Plays bundled ambient audio and a completion alarm.
- Shows a global daily leaderboard without requiring account signup.
- Uses country-aware profile flags for lightweight identity and leaderboard context.

## Technical Notes

- Built with Next.js, React, TypeScript, Cloudflare Workers, OpenNext, and Cloudflare D1.
- The leaderboard uses server-issued focus sessions to reduce obvious client-side cheating.
- The app is free to use and does not require login.
